mapper.select: SELECT h.hotel_id AS hotelId, h.hotel_name AS hotelName, h.address AS address, h.contact AS contact, h.hotel_desc AS hotelDesc, h.latitude AS latitude, h.longitude AS longitude, hi.image_url AS mainImageUrl FROM tbl_hotel h LEFT JOIN hotel_image hi ON hi.fk_hotel_id = h.hotel_id AND hi.is_main = 'Y' WHERE h.active_yn = 'Y' AND h.approve_status = 'APPROVED' AND h.latitude IS NOT NULL AND h.longitude IS NOT NULL ORDER BY h.hotel_id ASC
